title: Bitbucket の 404 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article contains highly accurate technical information regarding Bitbucket 404 errors, their causes, and solutions.
Claims are well-supported by primary and official documentation sources.

A significant critical factual claim regarding the deprecation of Bitbucket App Passwords is missing, which impacts the article's freshness and could lead users to implement deprecated authentication methods. App Passwords are being phased out, with creation discontinued on September 9, 2025, and existing ones deactivated by June 9, 2026.
The advice to use App Passwords for scripts/pipelines and for generating new ones without mentioning the deprecation is a major omission given the current date (June 2026).
Some claims are general troubleshooting steps, but contextually appropriate.
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
duplicate source URL for the same claim was ignored
required_actions: Update the article to explicitly state that Bitbucket App Passwords are being deprecated and replaced by API tokens.
Provide guidance on using API tokens as the recommended authentication method for scripts and pipelines, linking to official Bitbucket documentation for API tokens.
Adjust any code examples or instructions that promote the use of App Passwords as a long-term solution to reflect the deprecation and suggest API tokens instead.
Review and update the entire article to ensure all authentication advice is aligned with Bitbucket's current best practices and future plans.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

sources.title: What is a repository slug? | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Bitbucket ではリポジトリの URL 名を「スラッグ」と呼びます。 (In Bitbucket, the URL name of a repository is called a "slug".)

sources.title: What is a repository slug? | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: スラッグは リポジトリ作成時に大文字が自動的に小文字に変換され、スペースはハイフンに置き換わるため、元のリポジトリ名と異なる場合があります。 (When creating a repository, uppercase letters are automatically converted to lowercase and spaces are replaced with hyphens, so the slug may differ from the original repository name.)

sources.title: What is a repository slug? | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: リポジトリページの URL `https://bitbucket.org/<workspace>/<slug>` のうち、最後の部分がスラッグです。 (Of the repository page URL `https://bitbucket.org/<workspace>/<slug>`, the last part is the slug.)

sources.title: Set repository privacy and forking options | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: プライベートリポジトリへのアクセスには認証が必須です。 (Authentication is required to access private repositories.)

sources.title: Set repository privacy and forking options | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: 認証なし、または読み取り権限を持たない認証情報でアクセスすると、404 エラーで応答する設定になっていることがあります。これはセキュリティ上の理由です。 (Accessing without authentication, or with credentials that lack read permissions, may result in a 404 error response. This is for security reasons.)

sources.title: App password permissions | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: 特に App Password を使用する場合、読み取り権限（Repository read）が付与されていない場合、アクセスは拒否されます。 (Especially when using an App Password, if read permission (Repository read) is not granted, access will be denied.)

sources.title: Using App passwords | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Bitbucket の Account settings > App passwords から、読み取り権限（Repositories: Read）を持つ新しい App Password を生成し、それを使用します。パスワード生成時に権限スコープを明示的に選択することが大切です。 (From Bitbucket's Account settings > App passwords, generate a new App Password with read permission (Repositories: Read) and use it. It is important to explicitly select the permission scope when generating the password.)

sources.title: What is a workspace? | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Bitbucket Cloud では「ワークスペース」という概念を使います。 (Bitbucket Cloud uses the concept of "workspaces".)

sources.title: Difference between shared and personal workspaces | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: 個人アカウントの場合、ワークスペース ID はユーザー名と同じです。 (For personal accounts, the workspace ID is the same as the username.)

sources.title: What is a workspace? | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: チームアカウントの場合は、Settings > Workspace details で確認できます。 (For team accounts, it can be checked in Settings > Workspace details.)

sources.title: Bitbucket Cloud REST API Documentation - Atlassian Developer
sources.claim: API URL は常に `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/<workspace>/<slug>` の形式で、スラッグは小文字かつハイフン区切りです。 (API URLs are always in the format `https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/<workspace>/<slug>`, where the slug is lowercase and hyphen-separated.)

sources.title: Using App passwords | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Bitbucket は Basic 認証（ユーザー名 + App Password）、OAuth 2.0、SSH キー認証をサポートしています。 (Bitbucket supports Basic authentication (username + App Password), OAuth 2.0, and SSH key authentication.)

sources.title: Using App passwords | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: スクリプトやパイプラインでは App Password が推奨されます。 (App Passwords are recommended for scripts and pipelines.)

sources.title: Using App passwords | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: ローカル開発環境では SSH キーが便利です。 (SSH keys are convenient in local development environments.)

sources.title: Set repository privacy and forking options | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: Settings > Repository details の Access level を確認し、必要に応じて変更できます。 (Check Access level in Settings > Repository details and change it if necessary.)

sources.title: Bitbucket Cloud REST API Documentation
sources.claim: Bitbucket Cloud REST API Documentation.

sources.title: Repository Access and Permissions
sources.claim: Repository Access and Permissions.

sources.title: API tokens | Bitbucket Cloud - Atlassian Support
sources.claim: App Passwords are undergoing a series of controlled brownouts starting on Jun 9, 2026 and will be permanently removed on Jul 28, 2026. All integrations using app passwords should start using API tokens with scopes immediately. (Implicit claim: App Passwords are being deprecated and will be removed by July 28, 2026.)

sources.title: 404 Error When Accessing My Bitbucket Account - Atlassian Community
sources.claim: Bitbucket の 404 エラーは、指定したリポジトリまたはリソース（ブランチ、コミット、プルリクエストなど）が見つからないことを示します。 (Bitbucket 404 errors indicate that the specified repository or resource (branch, commit, pull request, etc.) cannot be found.)

sources.title: 404 Error When Accessing My Bitbucket Account - Atlassian Community
sources.claim: このエラーは API 呼び出し時、Git 操作時、あるいは Web UI でのリンククリック時に発生し、通常はリソースのパスやスラッグの誤り、または認証ユーザーがアクセス権を持たないことが原因です。 (This error occurs during API calls, Git operations, or when clicking links in the Web UI, and is usually caused by an incorrect resource path or slug, or by an authenticated user not having access rights.)

sources.title: Error 404 while connecting to on premise bitbucket in Business Application Studio
sources.claim: このスラッグが API URL や Git コマンドで誤って記述されると、404 エラーが発生します。 (If this slug is incorrectly written in API URLs or Git commands, a 404 error will occur.)

sources.title: Bitbucket Cloud REST API Documentation - Atlassian Developer
sources.claim: API で特定のコミットやプルリクエストにアクセスする際、その ID が不正または存在しなければ 404 エラーが返されます。 (When accessing specific commits or pull requests via API, a 404 error is returned if the ID is invalid or does not exist.)

unsupported_claims: コミット ID の短縮形（例：`abc123`）が実際には存在しない、あるいは指定したプルリクエスト番号が閉じられて削除されたなどの理由が考えられます。(Reasons include a shortened commit ID (e.g., `abc123`) not actually existing, or a specified pull request number being closed and deleted.) - While generally true for IDs, the specific example 'abc123' and scenarios for closed/deleted PRs are not explicitly verified by a primary source snippet, though the overall claim of invalid IDs causing 404 is supported.

コミット ID は完全なハッシュ（40 文字の SHA-1）またはその十分な短縮形を使用してください。(Use the full hash (40-character SHA-1) or a sufficient abbreviation of the commit ID.) - While SHA-1 is the standard for Git commit IDs, and 40 characters is its length, explicit Bitbucket documentation for its API requiring this specific length or sufficient abbreviation in all cases for 404 avoidance was not found as a direct snippet.

プルリクエスト番号は Web UI で「#123」のように表示される数字です。(Pull request numbers are the numbers displayed as "#123" in the Web UI.) - This is general UI observation, not explicitly supported by a primary source snippet as a factual claim about internal representation or API requirement for 404.

Web UI でのみ操作する場合は、セッション認証が自動的に使われます。(When operating only through the Web UI, session authentication is automatically used.) - While generally true for web applications, a specific Bitbucket source confirming "session authentication is automatically used" was not found in the search results.
ブラウザの開発者ツール（F12）でネットワークタブを開き、API 呼び出しの actual URL を確認します。
詳細なエラー出力を取得: curl -v -H "Authorization: Basic <base64-encoded-auth>" https://api.bitbucket.org/2.0/repositories/workspace/repo-slug
